headline: Microsoft Highlights 6 AI Trends For 2025
summary: Microsoft Corp. listed six AI trends in a December 2024 blog post that it expects to shine in 2025. Here's a look at what one of the most influential AI hyperscalers sees in the year ahead.

headline: Consumer Tech News (Dec 30-Jan 3): Apple Stops Selling iPhone 14, iPhone 14 Plus, iPhone SE, Trump Seeks A 'Political Resolution' Of TikTok Ban & More
summary: EU mandates USB-C for electronic devices from 2025, Cyberhaven confirms security breach in Chrome extension, Trump seeks political solution for TikTok ban, Venezuela fines TikTok for hazardous challenges, explicit content found on Spotify, Squid Game season 3 stirring buzz, Samsung's Galaxy S25 Slim delayed until 2025.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Tesla, Netflix, MicroStrategy — And Shiba Inu Strives To Outpace Dogecoin In Crypto
summary:
Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors’ favorite stocks over the last week — here’s a look at some of our top stories.



The Nasdaq and S&P 500 ended a five-day losing streak on Friday, but the week closed with the S&P down 0.48%, the Dow losing 0.60%, and the Nasdaq dropping 0.51%.

headline: EXCLUSIVE: Top 20 Most-Searched Tickers On Benzinga Pro In 2024 — Where Do Tesla, Nvidia, GameStop, Trump Media Stocks Rank?
summary: Each trading day features hundreds of headlines and press releases on Benzinga Pro, a source for traders to see the latest news on the overall market and individual tickers.

headline: Elon Musk 'Likes To Talk Big Numbers' But His Growth Target For Tesla Is Not 'Realistic,' Says Analyst
summary: Karl Brauer on Friday said that he does not believe Tesla Inc can achieve Elon Musk's target of 20% to 30% sales growth in 2025 even with a lower-priced model.

headline: Meta's Facebook, Instagram Ads Promote Illegal Gun Silencers: Report
summary: Ads promoting fuel filters as gun silencers on Meta's Facebook and Instagram violate policies, but persist due to complex networks and tactics.

headline: Cathie Wood's Ark Investment Appeal Decision To Void Tesla CEO's Pay Package: Elon Musk Says 'Awesome'
summary: A group of Tesla shareholders, including Cathie Wood's Ark Invest, are reportedly appealing the Delaware Chancery court's decision to block Elon Musk's $56 billion pay package at the EV company.

headline: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest Books Profits On Hot AI Stock Palantir, Sells Bitcoin ETF Shares As BTC Starts 2025 On A Positive Note
summary: On Friday, Cathie Wood-led Ark Invest made significant trades involving PLTR, ARKB, and QSI. The PLTR trade sold shares worth $1.6 million, aligning with Ark's trend of reducing their position in the hot AI stock.

headline: Apple CEO Tim Cook Reportedly Donates $1 Million To Trump Inauguration, Joins Ranks Of Mark Zuckerberg, Jeff Bezos, And Sam Altman
summary: Apple CEO Tim Cook donated $1 million to Trump's inauguration, joining other tech leaders like Bezos, Zuckerberg, and Altman. Cook values unity.

headline: Microsoft To Invest $80 Billion In AI Data Centers For Fiscal 2025
summary: Microsoft plans to invest $80 billion in developing AI-focused data centers by 2025. This follows OpenAI's launch of ChatGPT and the growing demand for AI-powered applications.
